name: ethagent--draft
description: Professional first-draft generator. Trigger whenever the user needs to write anything from scratch: emails, reports, articles, proposals, memos, cover letters, blog posts, scripts, READMEs, pitch decks, social posts, or any other document. Also triggers on phrases like "help me write", "I need to send", "write something for", "I don't know how to start", or when the user pastes rough notes and needs them turned into a real document.
